data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. HOUNDSWORTH made a remarkable impression scoring by 6L a 3218m Cork hurdle earlier this month and a repeat of that effort would see him take plenty of beating. Leading contender. 14. WILD WILD WIND has shown improvement across her past two outings. The latest was a respectable fourth at Clonmel and another step forward keeps her firmly in the mix. 9. THE TOOTHPICKER shaped better at Cork last time despite finishing fifth. Could build on that showing and warrants serious consideration. 5. COUP D'ESSAY has been away 131 days. This looks a more suitable assignment so a better effort would not surprise.","runners":[3,14,9,5],"exclusive":false}
